title: Bombay Shaving Company is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Bombay Shaving Company is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bombay Shaving Company! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Coimbatore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bombay Shaving Company:
Bombay Shaving Company is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Shaving Company!
